---
id: list-o-auth-2-clients
title: "List OAuth 2.0 Clients"
description: "This endpoint lists all clients in the database, and never returns client secrets."
sidebar_label: "List OAuth 2.0 Clients"

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"List OAuth 2.0 Clients"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/admin/clients"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint lists all clients in the database, and never returns client secrets. As a default it lists the first 100 clients.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
